LanguageData.Need_Fearness_Desc: The current fearless level of the pawn. High fearless means the pawn stays calm in battle, while low fearless causes fear and panic.
LanguageData.Skill_Courage_Description: Represents a pawn's bravery in combat. Higher courage reduces fear when taking damage.
LanguageData.SevereBleeding_desc: I'm losing too much blood... I feel lightheaded and terrified.
